product_overview: A backend API to manage farms (fazendas), animals, daily milk production records, and user authentication with observability endpoints for health and Prometheus metrics.
core_goals: Provide secure JWT RS256-based authentication (register, login, refresh) for users.
Support CRUD and search for farms and nested animal resources scoped to authenticated users.
Capture and query daily milk production records tied to animals and farms.
Expose admin-only endpoints for user and farm assignment management.
Offer health and Prometheus metrics endpoints for observability and monitoring.
Fail fast and clearly when required environment configuration (DATABASE_URL, JWT keys) is missing.

features.name: Health and observability
features.description: Expose liveness and Prometheus metrics to monitor service health and runtime metrics.
user_flows: GET /health -> Receive 200 { status, service, timestamp } (healthy)
GET /metrics -> Receive 200 Prometheus text exposition
GET /health -> Receive 503 if DATABASE_URL or JWT keys are not configured (service misconfigured)

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Register new users, authenticate to receive access/refresh tokens, and refresh access tokens.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid { email, password } -> Receive 201 with created user or tokens (happy path)
POST /api/auth/register with invalid or missing fields -> Receive 400 Validation error (error path)
POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } (happy path)
POST /api/auth/login with incorrect credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)
POST /api/auth/refresh with valid refresh token -> Receive 200 with new access (and refresh) tokens (happy path)
POST /api/auth/refresh with expired or invalid refresh token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)

features.name: Fazendas and animals
features.description: List and retrieve farms scoped to the authenticated user, list animals per farm, retrieve animals, and create animals.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/me/fazendas with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Fazenda[] (list farms for current user happy path)

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/fazendas with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Fazenda[] (scoped farm list happy path)

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/fazendas/:id with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Fazenda (get farm by id happy path)

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/fazendas/:id with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 404 Not Found if id does not exist or is not accessible to user (error path)

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/fazendas/:id/animais with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Animal[] (list animals for a farm happy path)

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/animais/:id with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Animal (get animal by id happy path)

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> POST /api/v1/animais with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body { ... } -> Receive 201 Animal (create animal happy path)
POST /api/v1/animais with missing or invalid Authorization header -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)
POST /api/v1/animais with Authorization but invalid payload (missing required fields) -> Receive 400 Validation error (error path)
GET /api/v1/fazendas/:id/animais with Authorization for a user not assigned to the farm -> Receive 403 Forbidden (error path)

features.name: Milk production
features.description: Create and list daily milk production records tied to animals and farms for authenticated users.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> POST /api/v1/producao with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body { animal_id, date, liters } -> Receive 201 Producao (create production record happy path)

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/producao with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Producao[] (list production records happy path)
POST /api/v1/producao with missing Authorization -> Receive 401 Unauthorized (error path)
POST /api/v1/producao with Authorization but invalid payload (e.g., negative liters or missing animal_id) -> Receive 400 Validation error (error path)
POST /api/v1/producao with Authorization for an animal not belonging to user's farms -> Receive 403 Forbidden (error path)

features.name: Admin users
features.description: Admin-only endpoints to list and create users and manage assignments.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/admin/usuarios with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 200 Usuario[] (admin list users happy path)

POST /api/auth/login with non-admin credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> GET /api/v1/admin/usuarios with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> -> Receive 403 Forbidden (non-admin error path)

POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with tokens { access, refresh } -> POST /api/v1/admin/usuarios with Authorization: Bearer <access_token> and body { email, role, ... } -> Receive 201 Usuario (admin create user happy path)
POST /api/v1/admin/usuarios with admin Authorization but invalid payload -> Receive 400 Validation error (error path)

features.name: Health and observability
features.description: Liveness and Prometheus metrics for operations

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Register, login, logout, refresh and validate JWT sessions

features.name: Fazendas and animals
features.description: Farm CRUD, search, and nested animals per farm

endpoints.description: List farms linked to current user

features.name: Admin users
features.description: Admin-only user and farm assignment management

known_limitations.issue: API routes return 503 if DATABASE_URL or JWT keys are not configured
known_limitations.impact: E2E and integration tests need Postgres and JWT dev keys or env

known_limitations.issue: Dev Studio and Gemini-backed features require GEMINI_API_KEY
known_limitations.impact: Optional routes disabled when key missing
